zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Dutton於1428年出生在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可時，他的父親John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester29歲，母親Lady Margaret Atherton18歲。他於1464年與Elizabeth Grosvenor在英國爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1502年4月8日在英國英格蘭爾瓦維頓享年74歲，埋葬在英國爾瓦維頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Dutton于1428年出生在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可时，他的父亲John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester29岁，母亲Lady Margaret Atherton18岁。他于1464年与Elizabeth Grosvenor在英国爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1502年4月8日在英国英格兰爾瓦維頓享年74岁，埋葬在英国爾瓦維頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Dutton was born in 1428, in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester, was 29 and his mother, Lady Margaret Atherton, was 18. He married Elizabeth Grosvenor in 1464, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 April 1502, in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Waverton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Dutton est né en 1428, à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Atherton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Grosvenor en 1464, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1502, à Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.Chester, Cheshire, England: Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Dutton 1428 in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester 29 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Atherton 18. Er hat 1464 in Cheshire, England Elizabeth Grosvenor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. April 1502 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Waverton, Cheshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Grosvenor nel 1464, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1502, nel Waverton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Waverton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Duttonが1428年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンで生まれた時，父John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chesterは29歳，母Lady Margaret Athertonは18歳であった。1464年にイギリスチェシュアイアでElizabeth Grosvenorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1502年4月8日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワバートンで74歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアワバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Dutton(이)가 1428년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Atherton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1464년 영국 체실르에서 Elizabeth Grosvenor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1502년 4월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 와버턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 와버턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Dutton nasceu em 1428, em Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Atherton, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Grosvenor em 1464, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1502, em Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Dutton родился в 1428 г. в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Atherton, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Grosvenor в 1464 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 апреля 1502 г. в местности вавиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности вавиртон, чешир, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Grosvenor en 1464, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de abril de 1502, en Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
